title: GLM 5.2 FULLY FREE & FAST CODER: This AI Coder is CRAZY & WORKS!
summary: Big Pickle is a free stealth model running GLM-5.2, an open-weight coding model available through OpenCode. It provides around 200 free requests per five-hour window with fast inference speeds, supporting real coding tasks including repo exploration, bug fixes, and refactoring.
writeup: The video covers Big Pickle, a free stealth model running GLM-5.2, an open-weight coding model accessible through OpenCode. It matters because it offers free access to a capable coder without local hardware costs. Key takeaways: roughly 200 free requests per five-hour window, fast inference, and support for real coding tasks including repo exploration, bug fixes, and refactoring.
